title: potentilla subacaulis
intro: Potentilla subacaulis, also known as dwarf five-finger or creeping cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Potentilla subacaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
